expected: After a successful PATCH /communication-channels/:id, both the detail heading and sidebar list show the updated channel title without a manual page reload.
redEvidence: corepack pnpm --filter @kiss-pm/web test -- src/communications/lib/use-comms.test.ts -> RED: replaceChannelInList was not exported/implemented, so list replacement after patch had no state primitive.
greenEvidence: corepack pnpm --filter @kiss-pm/web test -- src/communications/lib/use-comms.test.ts -> 20 files / 261 tests passed; replace helper preserves other channels and replaces the renamed one.
fixApplied: patchChannel now returns the updated Channel payload via guardData; ChannelsSurface passes a replaceChannel callback into ChannelDetail; after successful save, the sidebar list state replaces the patched channel immediately.
regressionRisk: Low. Create/archive list behavior remains unchanged; patch detail still updates its own local state. Full browser traversal remains tracked separately as RISK-FULL-BROWSER-TRAVERSAL.
